title: Paracaryum crista-galli
taxonomy: Paracaryum crista-galli is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. The genus Paracaryum is a group of plants that are closely related to the genus Capparis. It is a member of the Brassicaceae family, which includes various types of mustard, cabbage, and broccoli. The classification of Paracaryum crista-galli is within the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta. Further classification includes class Magnoliopsida and order Brassicales.
